query: SELECT ta.id, ta.leadManagerId, lm.name as leadManagerName, ta.acquisitionManagerId, am.name as acquisitionManagerName FROM team_assignments ta JOIN team_members lm ON ta.leadManagerId = lm.id JOIN team_members am ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = am.id WHERE ta.tenantId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT ta.id, ta.leadManagerId, lm.name as leadManagerName, ta.acquisitionManagerId, am.name as acquisitionManagerName FROM team_assignments ta JOIN team_members lm ON ta.leadManagerId = lm.id JOIN team_members am ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = am.id WHERE ta.tenantId = 1;
